# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "false"

---
# Service Account for API Gateway
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for User Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for Order Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for Payment Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# API Gateway Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
    config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: "all-unauthenticated"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: api-gateway
      containers:
        - name: api-gateway
          image: api-gateway:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
            - containerPort: 8443
              name: https
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10

---
# API Gateway Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-gateway
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
    - name: https
      port: 443
      targetPort: 8443
  type: ClusterIP

---
# User Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "3306"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: user-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: user-service
      containers:
        - name: user-service
          image: user-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9091
              name: grpc
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10

---
# User Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: user-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
    - name: grpc
      port: 9091
      targetPort: 9091
  type: ClusterIP

---
# Order Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: order-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9092
              name: grpc
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10

---
# Order Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: order-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
    - name: grpc
      port: 9092
      targetPort: 9092
  type: ClusterIP

---
# Payment Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "5432"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payment-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payment-service
      containers:
        - name: payment-service
          image: payment-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
            - containerPort: 9093
              name: grpc
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10

---
# Payment Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: payment-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
    - name: grpc
      port: 9093
      targetPort: 9093
  type: ClusterIP

---
# ============================================================
# Linkerd Server Policies
# Define which ports are served and their protocol
# ============================================================

# Server policy for API Gateway HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Server policy for User Service HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Server policy for User Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Order Service HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Server policy for Order Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Payment Service HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
# Server policy for Payment Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# ============================================================
# Linkerd Server Authorization Policies
# Control which identities can access which servers
# ============================================================

# MeshTLS Authentication for all meshed clients
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identityRefs:
    - kind: Namespace
      name: microservices

---
# Network Authentication for external traffic (e.g., ingress)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: ingress-network-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16

---
# ============================================================
# Authorization Policies
# ============================================================

# Allow external/ingress traffic to API Gateway
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-ingress-to-api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: api-gateway-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: ingress-network-authn
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow API Gateway to access User Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gw-to-user-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gw-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-gw-mesh-tls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "api-gateway.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# Allow API Gateway to access User Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gw-to-user-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-grpc
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gw-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow API Gateway to access Order Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gw-to-order-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: order-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gw-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow API Gateway to access Order Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gw-to-order-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: order-service-grpc
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gw-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Order Service to access Payment Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: order-service-mesh-tls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "order-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-payment-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Order Service to access Payment Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-payment-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-grpc
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Order Service to access User Service (for user validation)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-user-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Order Service to access User Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-user-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-grpc
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Allow Payment Service to access User Service (for billing info)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: payment-service-mesh-tls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "payment-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-payment-to-user-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: payment-service-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# ============================================================
# HTTP Route policies for fine-grained path-based authorization
# ============================================================

# HTTP Route for User Service - read-only endpoints
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: user-service-read-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: user-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/users
            type: PathPrefix
          method: GET
        - path:
            value: /health
            type: Exact
          method: GET
        - path:
            value: /ready
            type: Exact
          method: GET

---
# HTTP Route for User Service - write endpoints
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: user-service-write-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: user-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/users
            type: PathPrefix
          method: POST
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/users
            type: PathPrefix
          method: PUT
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/users
            type: PathPrefix
          method: DELETE

---
# Authorization: Only API Gateway can write to User Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gw-user-write
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: user-service-write-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gw-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# HTTP Route for Order Service - create order
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: order-service-create-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: order-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/orders
            type: PathPrefix
          method: POST

---
# HTTP Route for Payment Service - process payment
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: payment-service-process-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: payment-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/payments/process
            type: PathPrefix
          method: POST
        - path:
            value: /api/v1/payments/refund
            type: PathPrefix
          method: POST

---
# Only Order Service can trigger payment processing
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-process-payment
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: payment-service-process-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# ============================================================
# Linkerd Service Profiles for retry and timeout configuration
# ============================================================

# Service Profile for User Service
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: user-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users(/[^/]+)?
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: POST /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 10s
    - name: PUT /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: PUT
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users/[^/]+
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 10s
    - name: GET /health
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /health
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 2s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s

---
# Service Profile for Order Service
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders(/[^/]+)?
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: POST /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 30s
    - name: GET /health
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /health
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 2s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s

---
# Service Profile for Payment Service
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: payment-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: POST /api/v1/payments/process
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments/process
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 60s
    - name: POST /api/v1/payments/refund
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments/refund
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 60s
    - name: GET /api/v1/payments
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments(/[^/]+)?
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: GET /health
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /health
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 2s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.1
    minRetriesPerSecond: 5
    ttl: 10s

---
# ============================================================
# Network Policy to complement Linkerd authorization
# Defense in depth - restrict traffic at the network level too
# ============================================================

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-ingress
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: ingress-nginx
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
    # Allow Linkerd control plane communication
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: user-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8081
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9091
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: order-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8082
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9092
    # Allow DNS resolution
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
    # Allow Linkerd control plane communication
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-user-service-traffic
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: api-gateway
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: order-service
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: payment-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8081
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9091
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-service-traffic
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: api-gateway
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8082
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9092
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: user-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8081
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9091
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: payment-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8083
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9093
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-payment-service-traffic
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: order-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8083
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9093
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: user-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8081
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
